introSection: Goofy's Sky School, previously known as Mulholland Madness, is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Disney California Adventure Park in Anaheim, California, USA. It was built by Mack Rides.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Blue track and supports, used to have red track and cyan supports.

fullText:
Goofy's Sky School, previously known as Mulholland Madness, is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Disney California Adventure Park in Anaheim, California, USA. It was built by Mack Rides.



Blue track and supports, used to have red track and cyan supports.
